new_value: {"description":"Per docs/security/witness-chain-attacks.md, verify-trace previously accepted any input originating from the workspace the meta-flow writes. Hardening adds: AP-1/AP-2 mandatory --state (or --allow-missing-state opt-out), AP-5 --expected-run-id + --freshness-window-ms, AP-8 --expected-pair-count + --min-entries, AP-3 --expected-binary-hashes allow-list + per-pair binarySha256 agreement check. Meta-harness now writes a tmpdir nonce outside the workspace, uses it as PL_RUN_ID, and passes it to verify-trace. Extends tamper-drill with T9-T16. Scope was verify-trace.mjs + run-meta-experiment.mjs + minimal harness/test wiring."}
